transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/RsZLdnAdMAuTrrK28zybz6tyhzMjXL_2

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (108 mins - No highlights)

Deal Information

Prospect

Samuel Spagnola — solo family law attorney in Greensboro, NC. Currently ~400K annual ceiling; aims to add an attorney, professionalize intake, and scale. Uses minimum fee model ($5K non-refundable on contested matters), average case value ~$8K. Moving offices Aug 1 to expand capacity.

Call Context

Reconnect and account setup discussion following prior SEO audit and SMB Team materials (book/video). Prospect seeking growth via better intake, more consistent lead quality/volume, and stronger digital presence.

Seats

N/A (services engagement; may add 1 FTE intake VA via Attorney Assistant; future attorney hire planned)

Budget

Current: ~$3–4K/mo to Matador (website/SEO/backlinks/blogs) + ~$3K/mo Google LSA; additional spend on SuperLawyers/FindLaw placements.

Willing to reallocate/expand for: Google ads (LSA mgmt + PPC ~$5–5.5K in ad spend combined), social remarketing ($600+ media), and SMB Team fees (~$5K–$5.7K/mo depending on package). Has cash on hand to move quickly.

Current State

Marketing: Matador handles site, SEO, backlinks, 2 blogs/mo; no PPC for ~2 years; DIY LSA; limited social/DIY boosts; decent AI/organic visibility claims but low traffic (~75 sessions/mo via SEMrush est.).

Intake: Phone via RingCentral; overflow/after-hours with Answering Legal; MyCase for matters; no dedicated CRM beyond MyCase pipelines; no full-time intake; paid consult model ($300) collected at booking sometimes; 24/7 coverage imperfect.

Tracking: LSA showing ~21 leads/2 weeks with 1 consult booked; inconsistent source-of-truth and conversion tracking.

Pain Points

Low conversion from LSA (1/21 to consult) and high junk lead volume.

Missed revenue from weak intake (no dedicated closer; answering service can’t sell paid consult value).

Limited web traffic despite SEO spend; lack of remarketing to recapture site visitors.

Reviews drag and occasional unfair 1-stars impacting rating and AI/maps trust.

Not open 24/7 on GMB; losing visibility nights/weekends when prospects search.

Owner dependence risk (vacations/illness halt revenue) and desire for time security.

Specific Requirements

Dedicated intake/reception resource trained to sell paid consults, handle follow-up, and manage pipeline.

24/7 answering with MyCase integration; ability to collect consult fees at booking.

Multi-channel ad strategy: immediate LSA optimization; targeted PPC (exclude cheap/child support; focus divorce/custody; HHI targeting); social remarketing to site/PPC traffic and custom audiences.

Review acquisition system and training to lift maps/AI visibility and social proof.

Consolidated CRM/lead tracking reporting; automation for reminders/nurture.

Tech Stack

MyCase (matters/pipeline)

RingCentral (phones)

Google LSA; no current PPC

Website/SEO via Matador (WordPress assumed)

Answering Legal (overflow/after-hours)

Considering: Smith.ai (24/7 + MyCase integration), Attorney Assistant (FT VA intake), Lawmatics (CRM) if MyCase lacks automation

Objections

Skepticism about coaching/sales talk; wants tangible ROI first. Status: Acknowledged; Dan de-emphasized coaching initially, focused on intake/ads wins.

PPC effectiveness concern vs organic/AI. Status: Addressed with HHI targeting, negatives, keyword-level optimization, remarketing; open to test.

Other Solutions Under Evaluation

Matador (status quo; open to leaving; 60-day notice)

Smith.ai for 24/7 answering

Attorney Assistant (SMB sister co) for full-time intake VA

Timeline

Ready to move now; office move Aug 1.

LSA takeover immediate; PPC/social ~30 days to go live; possible site transfer/redesign 60–90 days.

Has Thursday meetings scheduled with Smith.ai and Attorney Assistant.

Decision Maker

Samuel Spagnola (solo owner)

Procurement Process

Samuel decides; willing to reallocate from Matador (60-day notice). Wants SMB Team proposal with package options; prioritize intake + ads, then web/SEO; budget available.

Next steps

Dan to send proposal with:

Option A: Web/SEO + Google-only ads (~<$5K/mo SMB fee; ad spend separate)

Option B: Full-service marketing incl. social remarketing ($5,697/mo SMB fee; larger ad mgmt)

LSA mgmt + PPC build specifics, social plan, review program

Coordinate LSA takeover and PPC build; install Meta pixel and remarketing.

Thursday:

Smith.ai call at 1:00 ET (24/7 answering; MyCase integration; scripts)

Attorney Assistant call at 3:30 ET (pricing, secret shop, scripts; FT VA intake)

Dan to run after-hours maps visibility comparison; send review training resources (Five Star Attorney) and audit insights.

Same-day follow-up call at 4:30 ET to review plan if schedules allow.

Q&A

Questions We Asked

What do you want to achieve by EOY/1–3 years?

Add another attorney; break past ~$400K to ~$650–700K near term; long-term to $1M via 12 contested cases/mo; primary driver is time security and business resilience beyond owner.

How many leads/what’s conversion now?

LSA: ~21 leads/2 weeks; 1 consult booked; paid consult $300; significant junk; believes intake scripting/role is weak.

Are calls being missed/abandoned?

Uses Answering Legal overflow; believes rare misses but lacks consolidated reporting; open to auditing RingCentral logs.

Current ads?

Only LSA; no PPC for ~2 years; skeptical but open if targeted.

Tech stack/CRM?

MyCase for intake pipeline; no separate CRM; Matador call tracking number; open to Lawmatics if needed.

Budget and current vendor scope?

~$3.5–4K/mo to Matador (site/SEO/blogs/backlinks); LSA budget ~$3K/mo; spends on directories; open to moving/ bundling with SMB.

Desired case volume and economics?

Goal: 12 contested/mo; average initial fee $5K (non-refundable), avg case value ~$8K; currently ~4/month; most from Google search.

Questions They Asked

Does PPC still work vs organic/AI?

We shared PPC is effective with proper targeting (HHI, negatives, dayparting) and fuels remarketing; LSA+PPC tested in family law; can pivot if LSA underperforms.

Can intake collect consult fees at booking?

Yes; with trained intake (Attorney Assistant) and 24/7 answering (Smith.ai) + scripts/tonality; many SMB clients collect at booking successfully.

Do you produce social videos or only AI avatars?

We script, produce, and approve both AI avatar videos and can incorporate client-shot or high-production assets; provide kits/direction if needed.

Hosting/website changes—does it matter?

As AOR we manage hosting, security, uptime, speed, tracking, and AI/maps readiness; may transfer/refresh WordPress or rebuild if conversion-limited; won’t discard working assets.

After-hours scheduling expectations?

24/7 live answer to capture/qualify; book free intake with VA during business hours; no need to put attorney on at night; focus is conversion and next-step scheduling.

Action Items

Audit RingCentral for missed/abandoned/short calls; report numbers to Dan - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Samuel: Five Star Attorney audiobook link; review-acquisition ideas - WATCH (5 secs)
Rerun Maps visibility tests 6 pm ET for 'divorce attorney' & 'family lawyer' (2–5 mi); send results to Samuel - WATCH (5 secs)
Attend Smith.ai call w/ Nicole Jun 25 1 pm ET - WATCH (5 secs)
Attend Attorney Assistant call w/ Colleen/Andrew Jun 25 3:30 pm ET; request secret shop + scripts - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Samuel: proposal (LSA+PPC, full-service, web/SEO) + agreement; schedule review - WATCH (5 secs)
